name: Operation Searchlight (East Pakistan, 1971)
detail: Pakistan Army crackdown on Bengali nationalists beginning March 25, 1971; targeted Dhaka University, Hindu communities, Awami League supporters

name: Operation Zarb-e-Azb (North Waziristan, 2014)
detail: Major Pakistan Army offensive against TTP in North Waziristan FATA; displaced 1 million civilians; followed APS massacre

name: Operation Rah-e-Nijat (South Waziristan, 2009)
detail: Pakistan Army offensive against Baitullah Mehsud and TTP in South Waziristan; 30,000 troops deployed

name: US CIA Drone Strike Campaign (FATA, 2004–2018)
detail: ~430 CIA drone strikes in Pakistan's FATA/KPK; killed 2,400–3,700 including civilians and militants; conducted without full Pakistani public consent

name: Operation Silence — Lal Masjid Siege (2007)
detail: Pakistan SSG commandos stormed Lal Masjid (Red Mosque) Islamabad; killed ~154; ended week-long occupation by radical students

name: US SEAL Raid on Bin Laden Compound (Abbottabad)
detail: US Navy SEAL Team 6 conducted Operation Neptune Spear on May 2, 2011; killed Osama bin Laden; conducted without Pakistani knowledge or consent

name: TTP Attack — Army Public School Peshawar
detail: TTP gunmen stormed APS killing 149 (132 children); Pakistan's deadliest terrorist attack; triggered National Action Plan

name: Indian Air Force Strike — Balakot, KPK (2019)
detail: India struck alleged JeM training camp in Balakot following Pulwama attack; first Indian air strike on Pakistani soil since 1971; Pakistan denied significant damage
